name: openit-people
description: Contacts directory. Anyone who files a ticket should land here so we can identify askers consistently across tickets and channels.

fields.label: Name
fields.comment: How the person is referred to. 'Alice Johnson', 'Bob from Marketing', etc.

fields.label: Email
fields.comment: Primary email. Often the lookup key for matching ticket askers to people rows.

fields.label: Role / title
fields.comment: Job title or functional role. 'Senior Engineer', 'External contractor', etc.

fields.label: Reachable on
fields.comment: Identifiers for reaching this person on connected channels. Format: '<channel>:<id>'. E.g. ['slack:U01ABC', 'email:alice@x.com', 'teams:alice@org.com']. Pure-local installs typically have just the email.

fields.label: Notes
fields.comment: Admin-only context — e.g. 'works remotely on a personal laptop', 'on PTO until X'.
